category_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/gavinbeatty/mkvtomp4 describes conversion of H.264 mkv files to mp4 without re-encoding video.
source_facts.description says mkvtomp4 converts mkv files to mp4.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/gavinbeatty/mkvtomp4 uses the heading mkvtomp4.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/gavinbeatty/mkvtomp4 points users to the manual in doc/mkvtomp4.1.txt.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is an official GitHub source repository and the project page shows repository gavinbeatty/mkvtomp4.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README states it converts H.264 mkv files without re-encoding video.
source_facts.description says it converts mkv files to mp4.
